monitoring_checkpoint: environment plus harvest and participation checkpoints
adaptation_trigger: signal drift or poor sustainability outcome
monitoring_or_feedback_signal: community-sourced and sensor data are merged into an online dashboard for feedback control
implementation_risk: overbuilt systems may fail if local participation drops

monitoring_checkpoint: visual soil and practice evaluation checkpoints
monitoring_or_feedback_signal: farmers need support in initial stages and should help shape monitoring tool design
implementation_risk: monitoring fails when tool design ignores farmer priorities

monitoring_or_feedback_signal: dashboards become stronger when stakeholders contribute to full construction not only end-stage dissemination
implementation_risk: dashboard may become decorative if participation is superficial

monitoring_or_feedback_signal: bottom-up appraisal helps tailor innovation baskets and reveals support gaps affecting adoption
implementation_risk: innovation selection fails when support deficits remain hidden

adaptation_trigger: new trial outcome requires updated interpretation
monitoring_or_feedback_signal: near-real-time digital dashboards reduce lag between data collection and decision use
implementation_risk: monitoring is weak when results arrive too late for action

monitoring_or_feedback_signal: dashboard provides location-aware decision support for optimizing establishment and management
implementation_risk: spatial tools fail if not connected to actionable decisions

adaptation_trigger: weak local M&E or poor policy execution
monitoring_or_feedback_signal: subnational adaptation frameworks remain weak where local monitoring and evaluation efforts are limited
implementation_risk: implementation drifts without local monitoring structure
